name: GMT-Master II
description:
The GMT-Master II 'Pepsi' is arguably the most desirable Rolex in the entire collection. Originally designed for Pan Am pilots in 1955, the dual-timezone complication combined with the legendary red and blue bezel has made this one of the most coveted watches in horological history.

The Pepsi colorway — red for day, blue for night — is instantly recognizable to watch enthusiasts worldwide. On a Jubilee bracelet, the overall package is nothing short of spectacular. This is the Rolex that collectors obsess over and style icons wear. Limited availability — serious buyers only.
descriptionShort: The legendary Pepsi. Red/blue bezel, dual timezone. The most coveted GMT-Master configuration.
keyPoints: Iconic 'Pepsi' red and blue Cerachrom bezel
One of the most sought-after Rolex references
seoTitle: Rolex GMT-Master II Pepsi | Artemis Watches Montreal
seoDescription: Shop the Rolex GMT-Master II 'Pepsi' at Artemis — Montreal's premier luxury watch destination. Premium range, 30-day guarantee, free shipping. $1,400 CAD.
